---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for RK-SAVR
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing. Is this related to the RK-SAVR methodology, performance, or usability?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Paper Reference

If this feature relates to the RK-SAVR paper (arXiv:2509.20015v3), please reference the relevant section or proposition:

- [ ] Section 1: Algorithm
- [ ] Section 2: Statistical Properties
- [ ] Section 3: Extensions
- [ ] Not applicable (original contribution)

## Use Case

Describe your use case. How would this feature be used? Who would benefit from it?

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here:

```javascript
// Example API design
import { newFeature } from 'rksavr';

const result = newFeature(data, options);
```

## Priority

How important is this feature to your work?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my research/production use
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and feature requests
- [ ] I have checked the [API documentation](../API.md) to ensure this doesn't already exist
- [ ] I have considered how this fits with the project's scope and goals
